title: Crafting a Product Description for an E-commerce Website
scenario: Write a product description for a new smartwatch that includes features such as heart rate monitoring, GPS tracking, and notification alerts. The target audience is fitness-conscious individuals. The product description should highlight the key features and benefits of the smartwatch while appealing to the target audience's interests and pain points. The final output should be a concise and compelling text that includes relevant product images.
constraints: Should include at least 2 product features and 1 customer testimonial

evaluationCriteria.description: The product description should focus on the key features and benefits of the smartwatch.
The product description should appeal to the target audience's interests and pain points.
The product description should be concise and to the point.
The product description should adhere to the word count and feature count constraints.
